message:
feat(usage): implement BurnRateInfo struct and calculation

Add burn rate tracking to calculate token consumption rate from log data.
This enables depletion prediction and smart rotation decisions.

Key implementation:
- BurnRateInfo struct with tokens/min, tokens/hr, per-model breakdown
- CalculateBurnRate() analyzes log entries within a time window
- Confidence scoring based on sample size, coverage, recency, consistency
- Window filtering excludes entries outside the analysis period
- PercentPerHour calculation when token limit is provided
- ProjectDepletion() estimates time until limit exhaustion
- ProjectUsageAt() forecasts token consumption over a duration

17 tests covering edge cases, filtering, confidence, and projections.

Closes: caam-ef8r

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
